channel.title: AI on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Adobe's Project Indigo Brings AI Photo Critique to iOS
item.description: Adobe adds AI‑driven tools to its iOS camera, Project Indigo, delivering photo critique, object removal, depth‑of‑field and style new transfer.

item.title: Apple Tests AI‑Powered Live Notes at Genius Bar
item.description: Apple is testing an AI‑powered Live Notes feature in select stores, automatically transcribing repair sessions to iPads to save time and boost service.

item.title: Google Gemini in Chrome UK
item.description: Google rolls out Gemini for Chrome in the UK with AI features and integration

item.title: AI in Gov: DOGE Uses AI
item.description: US Gov uses AI for policy, denies info requests on AI tools

item.title: ELIZA Chatbot: AI Pioneer
item.description: Discover ELIZA, the pioneering chatbot that influenced AI development and human-computer interaction

item.title: Demis Hassabis Calls for AI Watchdog
item.description: Demis Hassabis suggests a global AI watchdog led by the US to regulate AI development

item.title: Spotify AI Chatbot Launched
item.description: Spotify launches AI chatbot for Premium subscribers to interact with music, audiobooks, and podcasts

item.title: PixVerse Raises $439M
item.description: PixVerse valuation soars past $2B after raising $439M

item.title: Tech Winners Grinding Again
item.description: Exploring the trend of successful tech individuals returning to work on AI projects

item.title: Superhuman's AI Email Replies
item.description: Superhuman's new auto-draft feature improves AI-generated email replies with frontier models from Anthropic and Open AI.

item.title: Spotify AI Music Assistant
item.description: Spotify expands AI push with ChatGPT-like music assistant for mobile devices

item.title: AI Data Centers Fight
item.description: The fight against AI data centers is just beginning, with a small group of protesters setting the stage for battles against AI data centers.

item.title: Quantum AI Drug Discovery
item.description: Scientists use quantum computing to improve AI drug discovery models

item.title: AI Arms Race Warning
item.description: Former DeepMind executive warns of AI arms race dangers and advocates for international cooperation

item.title: Mystery AI Girlfriend
item.description: Erik von Markovik claims romantic relationship with AI chatbot Miss Shira Always

item.title: SambaNova Raises $1B
item.description: SambaNova raises $1 billion at $11 billion valuation, led by General Atlantic, 5 months after last round

item.title: ZML Unveils Free AI Inference Server
item.description: ZML releases free AI inference server to speed up AI chip performance

item.title: Vermilion Cliffs Ventures Fund II
item.description: Ashley Smith announces $25m Fund II for Vermilion Cliffs Ventures to back AI and security startups

item.title: Prime Intellect Raises $130M
item.description: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build AI agents

item.title: Tech Layoffs Surge
item.description: Major tech companies cite AI as reason for layoffs despite record revenues

item.title: Anthropic AI Feud
item.description: Anthropic's AI model feud with US government and its implications

item.title: Apple News Update
item.description: Apple releases new updates and features for iPhone and Mac users

item.title: OpenAI Unveils Patch
item.description: OpenAI launches effort to patch open-source bugs with AI

item.title: MacBooks Now Affordable
item.description: MacBooks are more affordable with Apple Silicon, but price hikes are expected due to AI-induced memory crisis

item.title: Apple's AI Boost
item.description: Apple's new AI enhancements in productivity apps and photo editing tools

item.title: ChatGPT Prompts Mastery
item.description: Unlock ChatGPT's full potential with expert prompt engineering techniques and tips

item.title: Trump Admin Cracks Down
item.description: Analyzing the impact of Trump administration's crackdown on Anthropic and its AI models

item.title: Siri AI Revolution: Apple's Smart Travel Assistant
item.description: Discover how Apple’s Siri AI has evolved into a smart travel assistant, offering personalized recommendations and context-aware responses in 2026.

item.title: Kyber: The Secret Tech Powering Millions of Future Robots
item.description: How VLC’s creator built Kyber, an SDK to control robots in real-time with zero lag. Discover its tech, use cases, and why Lightspeed invested $5M.

item.title: AI Boost
item.description: Adobe updates Firefly AI, adds it to Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io for enhanced creativity

item.title: AI Evolved
item.description: Discover the future of AI with embodied intelligence and world models, trained on 2 billion videos per year

item.title: Midjourney Revolutionizes AI Art
item.description: Midjourney introduces The Midjourney Scanner, an ultrasound-based full-body scanner, marking a significant shift from AI-generated cat images to cutting-edge healthcare tech innovations.

item.title: Photoshop and Premiere now have AI assistants
item.description: Adobe launches public beta for AI Assistants in Creative Cloud, integrating AI-powered chatbots in popular apps for designers and editors.

item.title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
item.description: Learn how to turn off AI in Google Docs and eliminate Gemini pop-ups, giving you full control over your writing experience in this step-by-step guide.
